response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with deep web and full-stack experience, but the role demands a hands-on C++ developer for industrial automation. His only professional C++ work was a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015, and he shows no exposure to MQTT, industrial protocols, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle practices. His low-latency DLang systems work is adjacent but not a substitute for the required modern C++/STL depth in this domain.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Event-driven architecture experience and broad multi-stack versatility across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Strong engineering-craft background: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~6 months in 2014–2015); primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
No industrial automation, IoT/MQTT, or IEC 62443 / SDL security-standards experience
No demonstrated message-broker-based large-scale C++ systems or Azure cloud exposure relevant to the role

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or IoT protocol experience
